_doc: Single source of truth for the installer, the Claude Code marketplace, and CI. To add a new skill: drop a folder under skills/ and add an entry below.

shared_env.name: OBSIDIAN_BRAIN_PATH
shared_env.description: Path to your Obsidian-style brain/wiki root. Used by skills that read/write notes.

skills.name: session-journal
skills.description: Record and archive work sessions into an Obsidian-style brain/wiki.

skills.name: wiki-save
skills.description: Save content/ideas into an Obsidian-style brain/wiki on request.

external_tools.name: notebooklm
external_tools.description: NotebookLM CLI (login required before first run).

skills.name: vapi-build
skills.description: Interactive end-to-end builder for production Vapi voice agents with n8n tools.

external_tools.name: vapi
external_tools.description: Vapi CLI (login required before first run).

external_tools.name: n8n
external_tools.description: n8n instance (optional, for custom tool workflows).
